allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Game 4 breakout: item system, paddle physics, ball rework, and falling object fixes' --body ' *)
PowerShell($headers = @{ "Authorization" = "token $env:GITHUB_TOKEN"; "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json" }; if \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { "Token found" } else { "No GITHUB_TOKEN env var" })
